title: Reading and Use of English - Part 3
description: Complete the text with the correct form of the word in brackets.

content.text: The (0) of this discovery was (1) . Scientists made an (2) breakthrough that could change the way we think about the universe. The (3) of the research team was evident from the start, and their (4) to the project never wavered. What made their work truly (5) was the combination of traditional methods with (6) new technology. The results exceeded all (7) and brought (8) recognition to the entire department.

questions.explanation: We need an adjective: 'astonishing' means very surprising.
We need a noun: 'dedication' means commitment.
We need an adjective: 'remarkable' means worthy of attention.
We need an adjective: 'revolutionary' means involving a great change.
We need an adjective: 'international' means involving more than one country.
